innovator s research center.how_to_use: The Innovator's Research Center was a released with the Innovation Event: Sponsored by Black Panther. It was obtained from The Innovator at the Power Generator. It was the cornerstone of the event and was needed to obtain the two event badges-- Electric and Elemental. Not only would this be used to combine ores from three separate elemental mines: lightning, fire, and ice, this would use any kind of ore to restore Haven City's power generator--the more they were upgraded, the more power they gave off (however it may have caused a bit of lag).

interstellar conqueror.how_to_use: The Interstellar Conqueror is a Decimal-Rarity added in the Reincarnation Update. This item uses different pulsars to charge itself, increasing its multiplier. However, it disables those pulsars. (You cannot 'pulse' them anymore.) When an ore hits the processing part, there is a small chance for the ore to instead be blown up and destroyed. All pulsar bonuses stack, except for the normal Ore Pulsar and Candy Core, which can only apply their bonuses once. Current known multipliers PulsarsUpgrade Boostx1.347x1.814x3.288x3.33x4.7x5.975x35.7 Due to mathematical inaccuracies of the game, take these multipliers with a grain of salt.

iron flakes mine.how_to_use: The Iron Flakes Mine is a added in the Halloween 2019 Event. It appears to be an "Iron Flakes"-branded family-size pack of cereal with a dropper on the side, spewing 5 ores in a row before going on a cooldown. The "ores" produced will look like small Basic Iron Mines, although when the ores travel through a resetting-device, their models revert from their iron mine model to a white standard brick ore. Because this mine lacks in quality, its usefulness is overwhelmingly situational, limited to research. Note that Ore Sawmill is capable of duplicating the ores. Back Label "IRON FLAKES, THE BEST CEREAL IN ALL OF MINERS HAVEN, SHARE IT WITH YOUR FRIENDS, FAMILY AND LOVED ONES, ALSO BE SURE TO TRY OUR OTHER PRODUCTS SUCH AS J#iTUKMEGREiGRENGK AND FWEFFEW(*. MMM, I LOVE THIS CERIAL - EROOMAD WHY DO I LOVE THIS - LIGHTOOFCOSMOS HOW - FARZADDABEST MY FAVORITE - XYLOTIOUS TROLOLOLO! - TROLL FACE I LOVE THE IRON MINE ONE! - OOFY HOW IS IT MADE? PURE IRON! THAT'S RIGHT, IRON! BE SURE TO POG WHEN YOU EAT IT." "MAKES UP FOR LACK OF IRON NUTRIENTS!"

iron mine.how_to_use: The Iron Mine is a dropper only available from at a 0.5% chance, added in the 2020 Countdown Event. This mine reused the model from Basic Iron Mine. It produces ores that are worth each, compared to the Basic Iron Mine's ores. The ores also cycle through the RGB spectrum, which will be invisible at night. Putting the ore through a resetting device will freeze the RGB rotation on the color the ore was when it hit the upgrader part of the resetter, or if the iron mine it came from is removed. The ore also emits flame particles that also cycle through the RGB spectrum but will not always be the same color as the ore and will be removed if it goes through a resetter and paused if the original mine is removed The ores are immune to fire. Due to the ores having a rainbow flame effect they cannot go through items such as the Azure Refiner, so the fire must be extinguished first.
iron mine.name: Iron Mine

iron mine chan.description: A gentle mine that lights up the room with her smile. She may not be the best but she sure tries her hardest.

iron mine chan.how_to_use: The Iron Mine-Chan was a that was added in the Black Panther Innovation Event. This item used to be widely obtainable in a large numbers, however it's unadvised to use this mine due to its low ore value. Due to the heights, one may have trouble when using Hydraulic Standard Platform above this item. You cannot obtain this item anymore as she perished during the destruction of the Haven in the Reincarnation Update. Any owners who obtained this mine before will still keep them. She soon was replaced by Doge-Chan on the map, though unlike Iron Mine-Chan, Doge-Chan cannot be interacted with and only serves as an assistance tool to locate The Masked Man.
iron mine chan.name: Iron Mine-Chan

jagged enhancer.how_to_use: The Jagged Enhancer is a , first revealed on Berezaa's YouTube on 23rd August, 2017. It was later added in the Resurrection Update. The Jagged Enhancer multiplies ore value by x3.5, but only applies this large upgrade to ores that have an upgrade counter of 2.8 or less. This makes it only useful at the start of a setup. However, because it has a tolerance for ores with less than 2.8 upgrades, it can be used alongside mines that produce ore with initial upgrades, for example the Atomium Mine.

king birthday cake.how_to_use: The King Birthday Cake is a Decimal-Rarity added in the Fifth Anniversary Event. It has a high base multiplier of x50 which can be increased if other cake upgraders are used before it. Each item increases its multiplier by +10 up to a cap of x100 where all 5 cake upgraders are used on the ore before entering this one. A small feature on the King Birthday Cake is its conveyor, going from a Ground elevation to the Raised elevation similar to Crystalized Engine.

king gold mine.how_to_use: The King Gold Mine is a Decimal-Rarity added in Part I of the 2019 Christmas Event. It holds an upgrade counter of -50. This allows it to go through numerous upgraders and still be compatible with cell furnaces. With the addition of upgraders with 0 upgrade count or negative upgrade count upgraders, you can boost its ore value even further. However, its huge ore size cannot be changed, stopping it from working with the likes of Ore Sawmill, Witch's Cauldron, or even Ore Tixicator, and preventing its ores from fitting into many upgraders. The only means of "shrinking" its ore is the Pulsar Octagnium Mine. Due to life requirement, rarity, ore size and drop rate, it is not advised to use this item in a real setup and it should only be used to obtain the Catalyst of Fortune.
king gold mine.name: King Gold Mine

l i m e.description: L.I.M.E. stands for "Lemon Imposter". The "M" and "E" means nothing.

legendary peppermint.how_to_use: The Legendary Peppermint is a added in Part III of the Winter 2020 Event, which can be unwrapped from the Delightful Gift of Mint. It upgrades ores by a random multiplier from x6 to x10. In addition to the multiplier, it paints ore red or white, applies immunity to radiation, and makes ore fireproof. However, if an ore is on fire when passing through the upgrader, it will be destroyed. leggendary black hole.how_to_use: The Leggendary Black Hole is an Eggxotic-tier hydraulic upgrader added in the 2020 Easter Event. Similar to the Void Cube, this item will suck up newly dropped ores in a ~28 units radius (~84 studs) from its center. After 5 seconds, it will upgrade the ore value by x20 and have a ~55% chance to be flung outwards, otherwise it will be dropped. While being upgraded ores can still get destroyed by other Status Effects, during this time, the ore is temporarily be unable to be teleported. After being upgraded, ores are incapable of being replicated. leprechaun trap.how_to_use: The Leprechaun Trap is an added on St. Patrick's Day, during the 2024 event. It upgrades ores by x5. If the ore is Gold, it will upgrade it by x10. When anything touches the stick, it removes the touched part and closes the box. Any ores that comes into contact will get destroyed, however, if the ore has a Shield, it will used it up and survive. During this closed state, the box cannot be reopened and requires replacement to reset. lightningbolt predictor.how_to_use: The Lightningbolt Predictor is a added on 9th April, 2017. It is a mix between the Lightningbolt Refiner and the Astral Predictor. The Lightningbolt Predictor is a button-activated upgrader, with each click making the upgrader activate for one second. Every click gives the upgrader +1 charge. Every 20 (?) charges will increase the first upgrade (see Upgrade Chart) up to 11 times, or at 220 charge. This upgrade slowly loses charge over time, and the upgrade will get weaker without constant maintenance. However, this item does not have a limit as to how much charge it can have. The upgrader also features gray metal parts, upgrader poles (to block large ore), and antennas on the platforms to show its influence from the Lightningbolt Refiner. lightningbolt refiner.how_to_use: The Lightningbolt Refiner is a Reborn-tier upgrader that was added on November 1st, 2015 at the end of the Spooky Update. The Lightningbolt Refiner can only be activated by pressing your [Z] key while next to it, however it used to be activated with the green button on the side. Button ClickedTime addedUpgrade BeamO/FYes+0.7sYellowOnNo-BlackOff If the upgrader is activated, ores that touch it will have their value multiplied by an integer value from 2 to 7. Using this device (or any member of its family) multiple times, without using a resetting device, has a chance of destroying ore. The chance of ore getting destroyed is calculated by (x-2)/(x+2), where x is the xth upgrade, for all x>=3.
lightningbolt refiner.name: Lightningbolt Refiner

massive quantum diamond cleaner.how_to_use: The Massive Quantum Diamond Cleaner is a , a fusion between the Quantum Ore Cleaner and the Massive Diamond Mine, added in the Heart of The Void Update. It multiplies ores by 14x and removes 1 to 3 upgrade counters depending on the ore size, with larger ores having more removed. This upgrader can be used before the Quantum Clockwork to get a total of 84x, as the quantum part of the Quantum Clockwork does only 5x. methuselah s mask.how_to_use: The Methuselah's Mask is a upgrader item added in The Magic Update. It is an area-of-effect upgrader based off of the demigod Methuselah. This upgrader multiplies ore value by 140x and gives the ore a random effect: EffectsProbabilityOre is lit on fire1/4 eachOre is made radioactiveOre is poisonedOre is turned into coal *1/12 eachOre is replicator banned(Ore turns neon red, cannot be removed)Ore enters a state of anti-gravity for 3 secondsAll ores enter a state of anti-gravity1/12000 When used after Meralin's Sorcery, the replicator ban and anti-gravity effect can no longer be applied to ore. However, the rare effect of all ores being made anti-gravity is still possible. While an ore can still technically roll these two effects, they are not applied; the 140x multiplier is still applied as normal. *Color changed to black, material to slate and given the "Coal" tag (powers industrial items). The ore proceeds like a normal ore; this is actually the only effect in this list that is not considered disadvantageous. midas blaster.how_to_use: The Midas Blaster is a that was added in the 2020 Easter Event. It was revealed in a discord live stream by OutOfOrderFoxy. The Midas Blaster is an immensely powerful portable blaster with a very large multiplier. Ores receive increasingly large multipliers the more times they are upgraded by it. In addition to its typical role as a Blaster, the Midas Blaster colors ores gold, changes their material to metal, and makes them incredibly dense, preventing them from being flung by explosions. After an ore has been upgraded by a Midas Blaster, each subsequent Midas Blaster use will add +1x to its chosen multiplier value. This effect continues to stack with each Midas Blaster use until it reaches the maximum cap of +10x. This effect will be reset by Resetting Devices. Multiplier & Destruction Probabilities Like most other blasters, the Midas Blaster destroys ore randomly, but the Midas Blaster also upgrades randomly like the Hydra Blaster. Both ore destruction and ore upgrade are independently chosen events; one does not influence the other. MultiplierProbabilityx3620%x5520%x8820%x12340% The average upgrade of Midas Blasters in endgame setups should be taken as x76.593, the geometric mean of its probability distribution. To summarise why, that is approximately where the median multiplier lies after averaging across repeated uses of the item. ResultProbabilityExplosion and destruction of ore1/3 eachExplosion onlyNothing Recipes |-|Recipe 1 = Item NameQuantity Needed1092 |-|Recipe 2 = Item NameQuantity Needed1171 |-|Recipe 3 = Item NameQuantity Needed1082 |-|Recipe 4 = Item NameQuantity Needed1853 |-|Recipe 5 = Item NameQuantity Needed1491 |-|Recipe 6 = Item NameQuantity Needed20142 |-|Recipe 7 = Item NameQuantity Needed1451 |-|Recipe 8 = Item NameQuantity Needed754111
midas blaster.name: Midas Blaster

mithril mine.how_to_use: The Mithril Mine is an , it works quite well in early life rebirth setups. The only slight drawbacks to the Mithril Mine are its mediocre drop rate and fairly large size. While it does have a high ore value when the player is yet to rebirth for their first time, the Painite Mine can be used more frequently as its standard ore size allows it to be easily cloned by an Ore Replicator (using a Large Converter Ramp) which translates to an easy 2x multiplier. The Mithril Mine's smaller ore size prevents it from being able to do this.

molten forge.how_to_use: The Molten Forge is a added on April 9, 2017, sold by The Masked Man for anywhere between to . The Molten Forge features a medium-sized fine-point upgrade beam, so it requires a fair amount of accuracy for ores to hit it. When the ore successfully touches the upgrade beam, it goes through two stages: The ore's value is tripled; sensitivity to explosions is increased and the material and color are changed to neon and bright orange, respectively. This stage lasts roughly 1 second. The ore's value is doubled (for a total of x6); resistance to explosions is increased; the material is changed to diamond plate and the original color is restored. This makes it very useful to use in explosion loops so that your ores do not fly away as much. The Molten Forge's ability to make ores heavier can stack by using it multiple times with the use of Resetting Devices. This can also be used with the Obsidian Infusion Device to further increase resistance to explosions.
molten forge.name: Molten Forge

morning star.how_to_use: The Morning Star is a Reborn-tier upgrader that was added in August 2016, along with the introduction of the True Overlord Device. It is a loopable upgrader that increases ore value by 70% or 7% (x1.7 or x1.07 multiplier) until it reaches a value of . This cash-based cap allows players to have a chance to obtain the powerful Overlord Device. OrevalueUpgrade<x1.7+x1.07 It also has an unusual insertion method of requiring ores to be raised slightly. This can be achieved by using an Ore Cannon, Ore Collider, or a couple of Nuclear Conveyors followed by a single Conveyor Ramp. Mines with large ores such as the Osmium Excavator can clip the bottom of the upgrader without the use of ramps or cannons.
morning star.name: Morning Star

newtonium mine.how_to_use: The Newtonium Mine is a added in The Overnight Update. Its ore value can vary from . The Newtonium Mine has a special feature shared with its evolved and fusion counterparts, that provides a buff to upgrades received from radioactive upgraders. The buffs are as follows; The ores from this mine are also denser, making them less likely to be flung by cannons/colliders and explosions, the former of which makes it the ideal mine for early-mid game speed setups by pairing it with colliders and hydraulics on top to prevent flinging of the ores upwards.

nightmare.how_to_use: The Nightmare is an added in the 2017 Halloween Event. It features 5 spouts and outputs ore at a fairly fast rate worth each. This attribute allows its ore to pass through several upgraders and still be cell furnace-compatible as long as the ore's upgrade counter remains at or below zero. (Some cell furnaces have a slight tolerance for upgrades.)

noobite mine.how_to_use: The Noobite Mine is a added in Part II of the 2015 Winter Event. It drops very special ores in that their value scales up as you get more money, and has the unique appearance of a noob's head. Ore value ranges from to , reaching the cap once the player has or more; this is shown when the ores have a head shape. After a player has reached , the Noobite Mine will stop working on cell furnaces that only accept ores which have an Upgrade Counter equal to or below 0 Processing the ore of this dropper in a Crystal Altar before it is unsealed will curse it. It is not advisable to use this mine to unseal the furnace for use in setups, as a cursed Crystal Altar will only give x1 multiplier. The Noobite Mine is considered a meme dropper, thus gaining a x20 multiplier boost from the Ore Memer. It is not advisable to take advantage of this as there are many better options than this mine.
noobite mine.name: Noobite Mine

nova star.how_to_use: The Nova Star is an star-type device added in the 100M visits event on the 16th of April, 2018. The Nova Star does not upgrade ores on its own. Instead, it amplifies the multiplier of every other Star-related item by x4 for 5 seconds; the Blue Supergiant is an exception as its multiplier is instead increased by x25 (x75 in total). The buff only lasts 5 seconds, making it wise to place it just before stars. The Black Dwarf and the Void Star can be used alongside the Nova Star, as long as the ore is not upgraded by another star item. It can also be used alongside the Catalyzed Star's first upgrade, increasing its multiplier to x20 (from x5).
nova star.name: Nova Star

nuclear chamber.how_to_use: The Nuclear Chamber is a Legendary-tier upgrader added in Part II of the 2019 Christmas Update. The Nuclear Chamber has a base multiplier of 2x, but this can be increased if an ore has at least 1 status effect. The table below shows the multiplier increase that each status effect gives. Status EffectPrimary multiplier IncreaseItems that apply the effectSmoking+1.5Flaming+1.25Sparkling+2 The Nuclear Chamber also has an additional effect in which the more ores enter it, the higher its multiplier becomes. This effect is minimal at first, but does not decay, nor does it require any status effects. Each ore increases the multiplier by +0.01. This caps at a multiplier of x4. The maximum multiplier, when the ore has all 3 effects, is x10.75. (2+4+4.75=10.75) It is easy to achieve the max multiplier of this item by using a mine with quick drop rate, like the Newtonium Mine or Breech Loader. Category:Upgrader Category:Shop Item Category:Small Category:Christmas Update 2019 Category:Legendary Category:Length 4 Upgrader

oasis.how_to_use: The Oasis is an released in the 2017 Summer Update. The Oasis features a wooden boat which can be sat in and driven around by the player. The furnace's multiplier increases depending on how far away the boat is from the furnace, from a minimum of x50 to a maximum of x2000. The multiplier increases by x1 for every 2 studs (2/3 of an in-game unit) of distance between the furnace and the boat. A good way to move the boat is with the Witch's Broomstick.

oblivion emission.how_to_use: The Oblivion Emission is an added in the Heart of Void update. It processes ores at x25,000 to x33,000 their value, duplicates the ores, and sends it to a random furnace on the base, excluding cell furnaces, if there is one available. The duplicated ores do not receive the 25k-33k multiplier. This mechanic is identical to that of Ancient Magic. To prevent an infinite loop from occurring, ores duplicated by Oblivion Emission cannot be sent to Ancient Magic. Strangely, only furnaces that have been placed after the Oblivion Emission has been placed can receive the duplicated ores. This can be used to focus all of the duplicated ores on one or multiple specific furnaces, though this can't be built into a layout; you have to do it manually every time. This interaction also seems to cause a bug where the ores try to teleport into where a furnace was, even after you remove it. This can be used to circumvent the restriction with cell furnaces. This furnace is useful in advanced RP farming setups, as the duplicated ores being sent straight into another furnace is more efficient than using a teleporter (though not as quick as having the mine drop the ore straight into the furnace), along with having a decent RP yield of its own. Category:Furnace Category:Heart of The Void Update Category:Enchanted Category:Reborn-Proof Category:Superstitious Requirement Category:Medium Category:Teleporter
oblivion emission.name: Oblivion Emission

Explosions affect the ore less, sending it a smaller distance than usual while keeping the ore the same volume. If the ore is flaming while entering the upgrader, it gains a 6x boost (totalling for a 12x multiplier), but the ore still needs to be extinguished.

ol faithful.how_to_use: The 'Ol Faithful is a Vintage-tier mine. It is the first Vintage item available publicly and can only be obtained from Mystery Boxes. After 20 seconds, ores from the 'Ol Faithful will grow to 1.5 times its size, and quadruple their ore value. This effect occurs every 20 seconds, up to 5 or 6 times. The now larger ores are heavier, making them safer to use with Ore Cannons and Ore Colliders, and more resistant to being launched by explosions such as from blasters, but are more prone to being stuck in small gaps. Ores will not grow if they are copied by an Ore Replicator or if the parent mine is disabled or removed from the base. It may be recommended to use an upgrader to reduce its size, such as the Hydraulic Presser or L.I.M.E.

ooftopian refiner.how_to_use: The Ooftopian Refiner is a Decimal-Rarity added in the April Fool's Update. It multiplies ore based on their order of magnitude. The multiplier is calculated by the following formula, where x is the value of the ore: ( represents the floor function, which rounds down a number to the closest integer.) Alternatively, if n denotes the exponent of the ore value in scientific notation, the formula for the multiplier is simply: In other words, the exponent is divided by three, rounded down to the nearest integer, then multiplied by 1.5. The minimum upgrade is x0 for ores worth less than $1,000 and the maximum possible upgrader is x150. Upgrade Values SuffixScientific notationMultiplier1e+31.51e+3919.51e+60301e+102511e+180901e+2401201e+300150

orbital cataclysm.how_to_use: Orbital Cataclysm is a Slipstream fine-point upgrader released during the Reincarnation Update. The Orbital Cataclysm is an upgrader that stores the upgrade count of the first ore to touch it, but destroys it in the process. However, the next ore to pass through will be multiplied by that upgrade count, potentially leading to very powerful multipliers. This process repeats immediately afterward, but instead of destroying the first ore in the cycle of 2, it does not. It is important to note that every 1 reflectance the ore has, it has 20 upgrade counter. 1 upgrade counter therefore translates to 0.05 reflectance.Category:Reincarnation Update Category:Slipstream Category:Upgrader Category:Rebirth Category:Large Category:Fine-Point Category:Length 6 Upgrader

ore collider.how_to_use: Ore Collider is a upgrader cannon. It uses the same mechanic as the Ore Cannon and launches ore that touches the tip of the conveyor. It multiplies ore value by 5x, up to 5 times. This results in the max multiplier of 3125x. However, the collider is extremely powerful, much more so than the Ore Cannon. This makes it hard to use as it flings ores far into the sky, never to be seen again. The distance the ore is flung is dependent on its weight and size. The heavier and larger the ore, the shorter the distance it flings. For example, Basic Iron Mine ores fly much further than Dragonglass Mine ores of the same size, but 2x2x2 basic iron ores flies a shorter distance. Strategies One way to use the Ore Collider is to use Molten Forge with it. The Molten Forge makes the ores so dense that the ores velocity is comparable to that of an Ore Cannon. Using Hydraulic items above a closed small space is also an easy way to utilize this item's good multiplier safely in early-game setups Using a Centering Conveyor, then an Ore Collider then an Ore Steamer with standard-sized ores will allow the player to easily catch the ores and get an upgrade from the collider. Using a Centering Conveyor before, the Ore Collider, and 5 Hydraulic Conveyors in a line slightly above the Collider the player can make a proto-"Railgun Cannon." (Use 3 hydraulic conveyors, starting from the upgrade beam of the collider, if using newtonium/yuntonium ores/ores with similar density). This method of launching ores isn't as stable as using a regular setup, but it makes setups about 2-3x faster, making it totally worth using if you are fine with the inconsistency. Ore density is not the main factor in deciding how far the ore is flung. Ores from Massive Droppers, even ones that aren't very dense, don't fling far, while small, dense ores from mines like the Draconicglass Mine are flung into space. Another way to use this effectively is with a Gravitational Gearwork (or its evolution). By raising it just above and placing it directly in front it is possible to get the upgrade from the Ore Collider, the Gravitational Gearwork, and having a super fast line of upgraders.
ore collider.name: Ore Collider

ore illuminator.how_to_use: The Ore Illuminator is a Reborn-tier upgrader. It was added on 16 August 2015 in The Combat Update. The Ore Illuminator is a very common reborn item and can only be used once without a resetting device. Ores cannot have their upgrade counter changed for 5 seconds or they will be destroyed. The Ore Illuminator will not destroy the ore if the upgrader increases the ore's upgrade counter by 0, which means you can use 0 Upgrade Counter Upgraders. The 7x upgrade will apply to the ore 6 seconds after it has been upgraded. There are a number of setups players can have after an Ore Illuminator to move ore for five seconds without using up much space on their bases: 1 Conveyor Ramp and 7 Basic Conveyors. 1 Large Conveyor Ramp with 6 Basic Conveyors. You could also use a Reversible Conveyor to stop the ore. Make sure that there is a conveyor slowing the ore down before the Reversible Conveyor, or else there's a chance that ores would pass through the Reversible Conveyor. A conveyor ramp then a long but compact path of Tiny Conveyors. Putting an Ore Gate after the Ore Illuminator, block the ore for 5 seconds before opening the gate. This is by far the most space-saving and simplest method. (This is only recommended if you loop ore in the setup. If a dropper is continuously pumping ore, the Ore Gate will overflow) You can use the Proximated Ore Gate, save that none of your ores are going very fast and that they are not absolutely tiny. This can +1000x to Book of Knowledge and give +5000x to Dark Illuminator.
ore illuminator.name: Ore Illuminator

ore indoctrinator.how_to_use: The Ore Indoctrinator is an and the successor of the Ore Illuminator. It was first showcased in Berezaa's stream on June 26th, 2018, and then added in The Knowledge Update on June 30th, 2018. The Ore Indoctrinator multiplies ore value by x666 at the cost of waiting a lengthy 66 seconds without having the ores upgrade counter changed (0 upgrade counter upgraders may be used). This 66 second wait time can be almost entirely ignored by having an ore wait behind an Ore Gate for 66 seconds, making it incredibly useful for already long loops. In addition, using a Stardust Illuminator on a Gargantium Mine/Core allows ores to bypass education and receive the x666 upgrade instantly.

ore negator.how_to_use: The Ore Negator is a upgrader that functions a lot differently than most upgraders. In addition to its 2x multiplier, it has an incredibly unique function that subtracts 5 from an ore's total upgrade counter. This can seem useless at first, but synergizes incredibly well with other items that depend on an ore's upgrade counter, such as the Pizza Oven or in conjunction with Cell Furnaces. The Ore Negator, along with the Alien Relic, can be used to reduce an ores upgrade counter low enough to allow upgrades from other items while still enabling it to be used with cell furnaces. Stacking these effects with 0 upgrade counter items can conclude with incredibly large amounts of money with few items placed down. The Ore Negator, along with a few select items, cannot be used more than once, even with Resetting Devices.
ore negator.name: Ore Negator

ore nova.how_to_use: The Ore Nova is an , a fusion between the Nova Star and the Stardust Pulsar, added in the Reincarnation Update. It was first leaked in a tweet by OutOfOrderFoxy. Upon use, the Ore Nova will apply a Nova effect to all ores on the users base, which applies an extra 4x to all upgrades from Star upgraders, while also giving a whopping 70x to all ores in your base, making it double the multiplier when compared with the Stardust Pulsar. This uses the same machine tag as the Nova Star and Stardust Pulsar, so using both is redundant. It also changes the ores' color to a shade of purple depending on the time of the day when pulsed, being light purple during the day and dark purple during the night. It also makes ores reflective. This does not affect ores that already have been pulsed. In relation to the Gargantium Mine, the dropper itself is also affected, so the user does not need to keep replacing and reusing the Ore Nova in order to make sure that all ores have the Nova effect. Category:Pulsar Category:Upgrader Category:Reincarnation Update Category:Advanced Fusion Category:Reborn-Proof Category:Superstitious Requirement Category:Utility Category:Remote Category:Small Category:Not Resettable
ore nova.name: Ore Nova

ore replicator.how_to_use: The Ore Replicator is a which clones ores that successfully touch its green field. When the green fields comes into contact with an ore, a clone of the ore is produced from the spout located at the bottom of the replicator. There are three ways that this scanner can be used. With a Large Conveyor Ramp in a regular setup (ores have to be 1x1x1 studs in size or more), with three Hydraulic Ramps (going up), or in front of the mine with the scanner right under the spout. The third method is good for when you have only one of a mine and want to make quick money. This scanner can also be used when you're trying to compensate for the 5-second Ore Illuminator education. Sometimes, however, the duplicated ore has the Illuminati symbol but does not statistically "hold it". The Ore Replicator also replicates an ore's lifespan; this means it cannot be used as a pair with an item such as Timeless Enhancement. When an ore is replicated, all shields are removed from both the original ore and the new one.
ore replicator.name: Ore Replicator

ore steamer.how_to_use: The Ore Steamer is an added in The Ultimate Update. It requires ore to be inserted from its dropper, or using a Large Conveyor Ramp or something similar. Its upgrade multiplier is similar to the Industrial Ore Welder, starting with a 6x multiplier if the ore has not been previously upgraded (If the ore was upgraded previously it does 2x, which is the same as the Industrial Ore Welder), then ending with a lower upgrade of 1.6x. This has a max upgrade of 24.6x (or 8.2 if the ore is upgraded). The Ore Steamer does not count as an upgrade, and thus is able to upgrade ores while still allowing them to be used with cell furnaces.
ore steamer.name: Ore Steamer

ore supernova.how_to_use: The Ore Supernova is a Slipstream-tier Pulsar upgrader added on The Slipstream Mini Patch in The Ultimate Update. When the "Pulse" button is pressed, this item will multiply every single ore that has been dropped on your base by a whopping x500. But despite its great multiplier, it has a very long cooldown, taking just over a full minute to become active once again. However, this can be easily bypassed by replacing/moving the item. In relation to the Gargantium Mine, its ores are given immunity to fire. This powers Interstellar Conqueror by giving it x5.975 more multiplier. ore winder.how_to_use: The Ore Winder is an added in The Resurrection Update. Due to its compact design, it only transports ores smaller than 1x1x1 studs. It transports ores from the Way-Up-High elevation to ground level, all the while tripling its value in the process. This upgrader can be used for a total of 3 times for a total multiplier of x27. Strategy As its ground conveyor is not blocked off from behind, ores can be put in from there. Since the upgrade beam is on the second level, ores will however, not be upgraded. This can be used as a cheaper, but thinner alternative to the Full Shield Conveyor for blaster loops. Because of its conveyor design, you can make portable upgraders upgrade 2 times when placed through the middle. If your ores are slippery, the ores may slip out the back from the momentum of the 2nd layer conveyor.
ore winder.name: Ore Winder

ore zapper.how_to_use: The Ore Zapper is a . A Conveyor Ramp and Raised Converter, or even a Large Conveyor Ramp, and placing the zapper one space after, is recommended in order to reach the upgrade beam. It multiplies ore value by 1.25x, up to 3 times, resulting in a total multiplier of ~1.95x.

You can bypass the size requirement for the ores with the methods below.

overlord device.how_to_use: The Overlord Device is an added on June 2nd, 2016. In order to obtain it, the player must rebirth while having cash between and , and it can only be obtained once daily. If the player fulfills the requirements for a different Ultimate-tier item, then the item with the highest cash requirement takes precedence. It simply multiplies ore value by x10, and can only be used once. It also adds a large upgrade counter of 20 to ores that pass through. It cannot be used with the True Overlord Device.
overlord device.name: Overlord Device

It is shaped like an L, and can be placed on the corners of conveyors or teleporters in order for the ore land safely. The ores it drops are worth .

palladium drill.how_to_use: The Palladium Drill is an that was added as part of the Halloween 2019 Event. The main dropper part drops large chunks of Palladium consistently, worth each, while also dropping small blue chunks of Cobalt in a way similar to the Yunium Mine, worth each. The mine drops Cobalt in an 8x6 area while the mine drops Palladium directly in front of it. Strategy If you only want the cobalt ores (small blue ores), here are some methods: Using a Separation Conveyor. Using a Precision Refiner to set the large orange ore on fire, while the small blue ores remain unaffected. By using a Hydraulic Standard Platform with an elevation of 3, you can catch the cobalt ores with a conveyor. A consequence of this is that feeding this mine directly into furnaces only processes the cobalt ores so feeding this mine directly into a furnace at this height for RP farming is bad. Using an Ore Evaluator set to , you can divide them in to 2 lanes, provided you haven't increased their ore value before.
palladium drill.name: Palladium Drill

pandora s box.how_to_use: The Pandora's Box is a added in the Reincarnation Update. Pandora's Box only functions when there are 5 ores or less present on the users base, at which point they can be inserted with a process multiplier ranging from x1M to 1de. If there are more than 5 ores, then Pandora's Box closes and its furnace does not process ore. Upon placement, the sound of a torch being lit on fire is heard across the server. Appearance Pandora's Box has a unique shape, differed from all cell furnaces, which is the appearance of an actual box instead of it having open sides with supports at the very ends. The item's color scheme is primarily neon purple, dark grey, and purplish cobblestone. When unsealed with less than 5 ores, the box reveals a neon-purple fade from transparent to opaque. On the lid of the box, is a skull carving with neon eyes. This item is based off the Goddess of Destruction, Pandora. Recipe Item NameQuantity Needed23317
pandora s box.name: Pandora's Box

Together, the 3 Christmas Ghosts upgrades ore value by x360 in total, regardless of which one is used first.

phase bombarder.how_to_use: The Phase Bombarder is an Evolved Reborn-tier upgrader added in the Reincarnation Update. As a standalone upgrader, this multiplies ore value by 15x and infuses Phase into the ore. This Phase property can be used in correspondance with a Phasecursor Furnace or Phase Processor to activate them, buffing their multipliers. It also features a fine-point beam in contrast to its predecessor which has an upgrade beam that covers the entire conveyor. When used with a Phasecursor Mine, the multiplier that the ore receives is increased to x50.
phase bombarder.name: Phase Bombarder

phase processor.how_to_use: The Phase Processor is a added in the Reincarnation Update. It's a furnace that acts similar to the Precursor Furnace, but instead of a mine it looks for ore that has been through a Phase Refiner (or Phase Bombarder). When a Phase-Infused ore is processed, it's processed at x500 instead of the usual x70.

If these ore are then processed in a Phase Processor or Phasecursor Furnace, the corresponding furnace is then activated, increasing their process multiplier. When paired with Phasecursor Ore, they receive an additional x2 multiplier, totaling for x8.

phasecursor furnace.how_to_use: The Phasecursor Furnace is an , a fusion between the Precursor Furnace and the Phase Processor, added in the Reincarnation Update. It has a base multiplier of x1k when deactivated. To activate it, it has to process an ore that has been upgraded by a Phase Refiner or its evolved variant, the Phase Bombarder, as they give the Phase machine tag which is required to activate it. Once activated, its multiplier is buffed to x5k. The multiplier is increased to x10k for ores with the Phase tag. Category:Furnace Category:Advanced Fusion Category:Reborn-Proof Category:Reincarnation Update Category:Large Category:Multiplier-Changing Furnace

pilotite mine.how_to_use: The Pilotite Mine is a Hydraulic added in the New Heights Update. It is suspended in mid-air, and produces ore with a cash value in the billions. The base value of the ores can be increased if the mine is elevated higher. It is not cell furnace compatible, but does have twice the burning duration than regular ores. Unlike most other mines, this mine does not just drop ores right in front of it. Instead, it expels them forwards. The best way to collect the ores is to put multiple teleporters in a straight line, with a wall at the back. A way you can take advantage of this is to lead the ore into Big Bertha.

pizza cutter.how_to_use: The Pizza Cutter is a is a , a fusion between Ore Sawmill and the Pizza Blaster, added in the Tenth Anniversary Update. This upgrader turns ore into 8 slices of pizza while also doing a 5x multiplier. Pizza slices retain the same mesh and dimensions as the original ore and appear in an area around the original ore, so ores that are large and off-centered/entering the Pizza Cutter with sideways drift may cause pizza slices to get stuck on the upgrader. The pizza cutter wheel acts as a fine-point upgrade beam.
pizza cutter.name: Pizza Cutter

pizza furnace.description: The ultimate weapon, a machine that values ore at the price of pizza! Draws power from pizza-themed items in your base.

pizza furnace.how_to_use: The Pizza Furnace, also known as the Pizza Forge, is an that was added in the Pizza Party Event. It is stated to be the ultimate item from the event, functioning as a weaker variant of the Book of Knowledge that is easier to power. It draws power from pizza-themed items placed on the player's base. Multiplier Additions Click the expand button to see the list. The following table represents the additional multiplier the Pizza Furnace will receive while the following items are placed down. Any duplicated items will not count towards the multiplier. ItemsMultiplier (+)x100x200x1000x1500x2000x2500x5000x10000Total:x46,500

pizza parlor.how_to_use: The Pizza Parlor was an added in the Pizza Party Event. It multiplied the value of ore based on their upgrade counter, ranging from a massive x50k to a modest x5. The biggest upgrades required the lowest upgrade counter, and vice versa for the smaller upgrades. Upgrade CounterMultiplier -1.4 or lessx50,000 -1.3 to -0.4x200 -0.3 to 0.8x250.8 or morex5 To make the most use out of this item, one may consider using an Alien Relic, an Ore Negator, or a Massive Quantum Diamond Cleaner, as they all have the ability to lower the upgrade counter of an ore. Using mines that start with a negative upgrade counter (Gargantium Mine, Nightmare, Diamond Breech Loader) is also a very easy way to get the largest multiplier. In addition, putting this item at the start of the setup means ores will have their lowest possible upgrade counter, further increasing the effectiveness of this item.
pizza parlor.name: Pizza Parlor

plasma iron polisher.how_to_use: The Plasma Iron Polisher is an that was added during the initial release of the game. As stated in its description, it quadruples (x4) the value of every 10th ore that passes. However, it is not very effective because it will not upgrade all ores that enter; only 1/10. As a result, players can use multiple Plasma Iron Polishers to increase the chance of upgrading ores, or use 10 to guarantee all ore will be upgraded. Even if an ore has already been upgraded, it will still count towards charging up this item for another ore that has not been upgraded.
plasma iron polisher.name: Plasma Iron Polisher

plasma scanner.description: This scanner is powerful enough to burn through concrete! Multiple uses of this scanner is rather risky, so caution should be taken when using this scanner

extra.drawbacks: Ores cant get upgraded by Plasma Scanner if they get upgraded a second time without a resetting device.
extra.effects: Multiplies ore value by x6. Does not share the same Machine tag with other scanners.
extra.old_effects: Destroys ore if they get upgraded by Plasma Scanner a second time without a resetting device.
extra.submission_description: The big ####### of scanners. The tomato of the pea pod. The jock among the nerds. Providing ores a hefty x10 upgrade, this scanner asserts its dominance over all scanners and ensures it is the alpha across all planes.

multipliers.raw_effects: Multiplies ore value by x6. Does not share the same Machine tag with other scanners.

plasma scanner.how_to_use: The Plasma Scanner is a added in the 2020 Valentine's Day Update. It multiplies ore value by 6x. However, if the ore was upgraded a second time, any sequential upgrade by the Plasma Scanner is ignored. This effect lasts indefinitely and can NOT be removed by a Resetting Devices. An unexpected upside is that the Plasma Scanner does not share the same machine tag with other scanners. Appearance The Plasma Scanner resembles the other types of grounded scanners, but with a purple color scheme. The supports are thicker than its counterparts, and purple tubes go up the sides, supported by metal clamps, up to similarly-colored plasma balls on top.
plasma scanner.name: Plasma Scanner

portable ore advancer.how_to_use: The Portable Ore Advancer is an Uncommon-tier portable upgrader added in the Initial Release. It multiplies ore value by x1.05 (5%), up to 31 times, for a maximum total of ~x4.54. It is also a portable item and can easily be incorporated into a setups.

portable ore enhancer.how_to_use: The Portable Ore Enhancer is a released in the Summer Update 2017. The Portable Ore Enhancer shares its upgrade tags with the Portable Ore Advancer and the Portable Ore Stopper, meaning only a total of 31 of these items can be used. The Portable Ore Enhancer increases ore value by 8% (x1.08 multiplier). Although the upgrader part is raised, regular sized ore (1x1x1 studs) can be upgraded with unraised conveyors. It is stronger than the Portable Ore Advancer but not as strong as the Portable Ore Stopper, with a total multiplier (31 iteration) of about 10.87x.
portable ore enhancer.name: Portable Ore Enhancer

portable ore stopper.description: A smaller version of the Portable Ore Advancer that can be attached to the edges of your conveyors for bonus upgrades.

extra.effects: 1st Upgrade: Increases orevalue by 12% (x1.12 multiplier) Upgrades 2-31: Increases orevalue by 15% (x1.15 multiplier)

portable ore stopper.how_to_use: The Portable Ore Stopper is a that was released in the Summer Update 2017. The Portable Ore Stopper shares the upgrade tags with the Portable Ore Advancer, the Portable Ore Enhancer and the Portable Tractor Beam. Assuming you only use this portable upgrader of the 3, it increases ore value by 15% (x1.15 multiplier) up to 30 times. It can be used an additional 31st time, but will only add 12% instead, for a total multiplier of ~74x. The Portable Ore Stopper has the shortest upgrader part out of the 'Portable Ore' trio, meaning you would need to have your ores on Tiny Conveyors to make sure they get upgraded. The Portable Ore Stopper has the highest multiplier of the trio, making it the most recommended to use in setups.
portable ore stopper.name: Portable Ore Stopper

pot of gold.how_to_use: The Pot of Gold is an . It was first seen on March 17th, 2017, and was available during the Golden Clover Event. The Pot of Gold starts out with a 5,000x multiplier, but for every upgrade the ore has, the multiplier is reduced. The process multipliers according to the amount of upgrades are as follows: Upgrade CountProcessing Multiplier05000x11000x2 to 5500x6 to 19200x20+100x A very special factor to this item and the Equinox is that Large Conveyor Ramps can be used to directly insert ore into the furnace section. Other cell furnaces, such as Santa's Chimney and Volcango, require an Ore Cannon.

precursor furnace.how_to_use: The Precursor Furnace is an , counterpart to the Precursor Mine. It was added in the The Resurrection Update and was revealed by Berezaa on his Twitter page, soon proving that it was a Reborn item. The Precursor Furnace normally processes ores at x70. However, it becomes activated when it processes an ore from the Precursor Mine, to which it then processes every ore at x500. This means as long as you process one precursor ore in this furnace, every ore until you rebirth or replace the furnace will process at x500. Its main gimmick, however, is its exclusive ability to activate the Precursor Furnace, bumping its multiplier up from x70 to x500. professional upgrader.how_to_use: The Professional Upgrader is a Premium-tier upgrader released during the 2015 Halloween Event. This item multiplies ore value by a low 1.3x but can be used up to 4 times. This means the total multiplier for 4 of these comes out to 1.3^4, or just under 3x. This makes it a decent upgrader for early setups. If the player owns the Ore Memer, then its multiplier can be increased by 2x if the Professional Upgrader is used before it.

proficient research center.how_to_use: The Proficient Research Center is an . It's the second of the four research centers purchased in the shop, and used to be great for new players to get research points. However, it is actually worse than the Basic Research Center for farming RP because the Basic Research Center produces 25 RP per 25 ore (1 RP per ore) while the Proficient Research Center produces 30 RP per 35 ore (~0.86 RP per ore). Despite being stated in the description that this item only accepts ore worth more than $20, it actually accepts any ores regardless of their ore value. What the statement at the description actually meant was that ores worth less than $20 don't add to the number of ores required before the research points could be given.

pulsar octagnium mine.how_to_use: The Pulsar Octagnium Mine is a . It was first seen on one of Berezaa's development streams, where he clearly states it would be a Slipstream-tier item. The item was later also shown on a tweet from Berezaa's Twitter. The ores from this mine used to have a value, but its purpose majorly changed after the Reincarnation Update. This mine is now pulsar activated, which means when you pulse it will destroy the highest value ore on your base then mimicked by this item's 8 ores that drop from the spouts, so the mine acts like an 8-ore replicator for your highest valued ore. This mine can also be useful for ores that are bigger than 1x1x1, as when this is used it can shrink the ores to 1x1x1. This can be useful for huge ores like Gargantium, and Massive Diamond. Uniquely, it is the only item capable of changing the size of King Gold Mine ore, as unlike Witch's Cauldron, this does work with it.

radio tower.how_to_use: The Radio Tower is an added in Part II of the 2021 Easter Event. As the description explains, this item is powered in a similar way to The Cosmic Tower. However, rather than using neon ores, it is powered by diamond-plate material ores. The easiest ways to obtain this ore effect are by using the Molten Forge or the Obsidian Infusion Device. Each diamond-plate ore processed gives the tower +1 charge. 1 charge powers the tower for nine seconds and can stack. When activated, the red lights on the antennae and the other parts of the top of the tower are turned on.
radio tower.name: Radio Tower

radioactive refiner.how_to_use: The Radioactive Refiner is a that upgrades ore by a variable multiplier. If ore value is: Ore ValueMultiplier or lessx3.5 to x3 to x2.75 to x2.5 to x2.25 to x2 to x1.5 or morex1 While its limit is significantly higher than its cost, it makes ores radioactive. This means that after 6 seconds, the ore will explode and disappear unless processed. There is also a money cap of , so ores over this value will not be upgraded by this item. However, it will still gain the radioactive effect. Strategy The radioactive effect used to be unremovable until Berezaa made the Tesla Resetter, which removes tags and effects from ore. The Wild Spore can also remove the radioactive effect. It can be used to get to the Crystal Altar's "shiny" stage.
radioactive refiner.name: Radioactive Refiner

reaper s fortress.how_to_use: The Reaper's Fortress is an Eggxotic-tier way-up-high upgrader added in the 2020 Easter Event. It is obtained when a player with an Eggield Launcher shoots out the egg. Upon collecting it, you will obtain the Eggield, which can be exchanged to the Craftsman for 1 Reaper's Fortress. The Eggield Launcher is only available to: Developers Testers Submitters (Rarely) Daily weapon from the Executive Gamepass. The ironically-named item has a random chance of multiplying ore from x5 to x7.5, making it fairly good for its size. Like other raised upgraders, you must use some method of raising ore up to its conveyor, such as a Ore Elevator or Large Converter Ramp. You can also use the Ore Cannon to reach it.

reinforced furnace.how_to_use: The Reinforced Furnace is a that was released in The Ultimate Update. It processes ores at a rate of 5x, but its elevated position makes it hard for ores to reach, compared to other furnaces. Consider using an Elevated Furnace instead, as it is more convenient to use. Methods Using a Large Conveyor Ramp just before this item, as the long fall will allow the ore to drop into it. A fast conveyor, such as the Nuclear Conveyor, and a Conveyor Ramp can be used. Its speed will allow ores to fly into the furnace. A simple, but a rather risky method, is to launch ores using the Ore Cannon. However, ores are not guaranteed to pop in as it has an unstable trajectory. Using an Ore Elevator and a fast Way-Up-High upgrader, you can also almost guarantee it to hit the Reinforced Furnace.

remote iron mine.how_to_use: The Remote Iron Mine is a . It was the first remote mine that players could obtain in Miner's Haven, until the Resurrection Update, when it was removed from the shop. It was placed back into the shop in the 2019 Christmas Update.

remote opal mine.how_to_use: The Remote Opal Mine is a that can be useful for a player in the early billions. It goes great with mid-game setups. The Remote Opal Mine is commonly used in farms with cell furnaces, eg. Cell Processor.

The Repulsion Device multiplies the value of every 10th ore by x6. This shares the same machine tag with the Plasma Iron Polisher and so cannot be used together. The Repulsion Device also features 2 upgrade panels as opposed to 1, so having 5 of these instead of 10 is enough to ensure every ore that passes through receives the x6 upgrade. rose palace.how_to_use: The Rose Palace is a added on February 15, 2024. The upgrader functions based on every pair of ores that pass through. It multiplies the first ore by x5. The following ore that passes is replaced by the previous upgraded ores, it will retains all effects the previous ore have. It acts like a Duplicator but does not net any new ores. The second upgrade will still be considered an upgrade and must be resetted in order to be upgraded again. rotary upgrader.how_to_use: The Rotary Upgrader is a Legendary-tier upgrader added in the Valentine's Event 2020. It multiplies ore value by x4. It also features a unique conveyor that has a Way-Up-High input and a raised input. Thanks to its unique layout, it can be used as both a Raised U-turn, and a Way-Up-High to Raised converter. Appearance The Rotary Upgrader features 2 upgrade beams which are both connected to a gear. It has a U-shaped Raised conveyor going around a central purple orb, as well as an additional Way-Up-High conveyor on the top, that drops the ores onto the main conveyor.

It used to be that upon claiming the final egg with The Craftsman, he tells you: "Thanks for helping me collect all of my eggs, as a token of my gratitude take this" but as of the 2024 Easter Event, you recieve the item upon collecting the last eggs you need, without having to hand them in. rush upgrader.how_to_use: The Rush Upgrader is a added in The Ultimate Update. Updated numerous times, it now multiplies ore value by up to x5 and adds up to to the ore's value. These upgrades depend on the amount of ores that pass through within a window of a single second, up to a maximum of 40 ores. It does not evaluate the actual velocity of the ore. It is be recommended to use an Ore Gate before it to easily get the max upgrade. For example, if 20 ores pass through this upgrader in a second, the 20th ore will receive a x3 upgrade and have added to its value.
rush upgrader.name: Rush Upgrader

sage justice.how_to_use: The Sage Justice is a , a fusion between the Sage Redeemer and the Blind Justice, added in the 2017 Easter Event. The Sage Justice processes ore based on their upgrade count. If the ores upgrade count is less than 3, then the ore is processed at a massive x5T. Otherwise, if the upgrade count of the ore is equal to or more than 3, then the ore is processed at a rate of x1.25 multiplied by its upgrade count, up to a maximum of x150.

The Sage Redeemer functions differently compared to other furnaces; it processes ore value based on how many times it has been upgraded divided by two, thus meaning that it cannot accept ore that has not yet been upgraded.

sakura falls.how_to_use: The Sakura Falls is an Evolved Reborn variant of the Sakura Garden, released in The Resurrection Update. It was first revealed on Berezaa's YouTube stream on August 23rd, 2017. Compared to the Sakura Garden's x300 multiplier, this item has a x9,500 base multiplier. The effect of ores, namely decreasing the multiplier by 5 or by 10 with flaming ore or ore from the Toxic Waste Disposal, meaning this furnace can also result in a negative multiplier just like the Sakura Garden. The negative multiplier will reset (0x) if processed with a flaming ore. As of the Reincarnation Update, this item was nerfed to a base multiplier of x9,500, however the decreasing multiplier was buffed to 5 or 10 (Ores or Flaming Ores). Its RP yield had been buffed to 90 RP/20 ores, however it has been confirmed that this is accidental. The supposed RP rate is 90 RP/200 ores. Appearance The overall structure of the Sakura Garden has changed. The tree has grown much larger, and the statue is now residing in the middle of a pond. There is a waterfall, and the bamboo on the sands is a bit more spaced out. The furnace part resembles the water texture.
sakura falls.name: Sakura Falls

sakura garden.description: Few things in this world are as tranquil as a sakura garden. Multiplier is higher the fewer ore enter.

extra.effects: Processes ore at x300

sakura garden.how_to_use: The Sakura Garden is a added on 9th April, 2017. It is a fairly rare Reborn-tier item which multiplies ore value by x300, but for every ore, its multiplier decreases by x1, and if it is flaming or poisoned, its multiplier decreases by x25. It only accepts non-flaming ores. Despite its drawback, the furnace is still much more reliable than other furnaces with such power. When using this furnace, it is best to use as little ore as possible, and to stay away from flaming ores as much as possible, or if you can't, use an item that removes fire. On Part 2 of the Summer Update, the life required to obtain a Sakura Garden was pulled back to life 250+. As of the Reincarnation Update, this item's RP yield has been nerfed to 30 RP/70 ores. The life required to obtain it has been pulled back again to life 350+.
sakura garden.name: Sakura Garden

santa s deluxe sleigh.how_to_use: The Santa's Deluxe Sleigh is an introduced in the Winter Event 2017 on 23rd December, 2017. This item was added back for Christmas 2019, received from the Gift of Snow Dashing. It references and takes off from the original Santa's Sleigh exotic both name-wise and to a lesser extent visual-wise. The exotic upgrader's appearance is (obviously) a hollowed-out sleigh with presents and candy canes laying around it while a festive-colored marking is positioned on the conveyor's center; warm yellow particles also swoop in and through the upgrader itself. It upgrades ore value by a simple x3. However, if the ore has been upgraded by its older exotic counterpart, the Santa's Sleigh, then the multiplier is increased to x4.

saturated catalyst.how_to_use: The Saturated Catalyst is an , successor to The Catalyst, added in the Resurrection Update. It was first revealed during Berezaa's YouTube Stream on 23rd August, 2017. Just like The Catalyst, this upgrader could be considered a fine-point upgrader because its upgrade beam does not cover the entire conveyor. Also any ores that pass through multiple Ore Sawmills have a chance of not hitting the beam, missing the upgrade. Another thing to note is that the Catalyzed Star does not share the same Machine tag with this item, so using both is an available option.

schrodinger evaluator.how_to_use: The Schrodinger Evaluator is an that is sold in the shop. Unlike most other upgraders purchasable in its bracket, the Schrodinger Evaluator has the ability to apply random effects to ore. Because of its unpredictable nature, the Schrodinger Evaluator can produce ore that is either significantly more valuable, significantly less valuable, or produce no ore at all. The more Schrodinger Evaluators a player uses, the less likely it is for an ore to survive, and vice versa. Using many Schrodingers in quick succession does not guarantee valuable ore, as there is always a possibility that an ore's value will be set to . When a Schrodinger Evaluator upgrades an ore, the effect it applies is typically not apparent without the use of an Ore Tracker; however, its blue machinery will turn red if an explosion is created and turn yellow if sparkles are applied to an ore. Many Schrodinger Evaluators are typically used in end-game early Rebirth setups to boost ore value from the trillions and quadrillions to the quintillions. The Desert Monument effectively prevents the Schrodinger Evaluator from setting ore value to by making the ore unable to lose value. List of Possible Effects EffectChancex2.145%Ore is destroyed25%x3.25%x6, ore is given pink sparklesx2.2, ore is flung + Ore value set to Explosion Tips When using Schrodinger Evaluators, it is important to find a balance between the amount of evaluators you use and the value of the upgraded ore. Using too many evaluators can result in low ore rates, and too little schrodingers can result in low-quality ores. Pairing the Schrodinger Evaluator with portable blasters such as the Big Bad Blaster is effective, as the evaluator can act as a shield to prevent ore from flying off the base. A recommended amount of 5 - 7 Schrodinger Evaluators is perfect for a beginner so there is a decent chance you will not have your ore destroyed or set to 1$. The average or expected multiplier of a Schrodinger Evaluator is x1.515assuming that the ore is recovered when flung and that the ore value is much greater than 1B. This means that after 5 Schrodinger Evaluators, the average multiplier is roughly x9.4. However, the chance that after 5 uses the ore will be destroyed, exploded, or set to $1 is 88%. Chances of Minimum and Maximum Multiplier can be seen below (Number in the ( ) assumes you can handle the fling) UsesMinimum MultiplierMaximum MultiplierMinimum Multiplier ChanceMaximum Multiplier ChanceChance For At Least 1 Negative EffectChance For Only Positive Effect1x2.1x645%5%45% (40%)55% (60%)2x4.41x3620.25%0.25%69.75% (64%)30.25% (36%)3x9.261x216≈9.113%≈0.013%≈83.362% (78.4%)≈16.638% (21.6%)4x19.4481x1,296≈4.1%≈0.0006%≈90.85% (87.04%)≈9.15% (12.96%)5x40.84101x7,776≈1.845%≈0.00003%≈95.968% (92.224%)≈5.032% (7.776%)
schrodinger evaluator.name: Schrodinger Evaluator

scorpium mine.how_to_use: The Scorpium Mine is a released in the 2016 Fourth of July Update. It is a life 20+ reborn item and the value of the ores gradually increase based on the amount of time since the mine was placed. Like other droppers on its level, Scorpium Mine ores do not work in cell furnaces. The ore's value is equal to SecondsOnBase1.2 *. The value of the ores begins at , immediately after the placement of the mine. The maximum ore value was recently buffed and ores are now capable of reaching (However, this takes a while.). In the Easter Update on April 15th, 2017, the Scorpium Mine's stats were tweaked: The max ore value cap is reached after being placed for 3 hours and 30 minutes. (Previously 3 hours). When the max cap is reached, it will dispense ores 40% faster. (1 ore/0.6 sec)
scorpium mine.name: Scorpium Mine

shard park.how_to_use: The Shard Park is a Reborn-tier upgrader added in the 2020 Valentine's Day Update. The item multiplies ore value based on the number of Shards of Life that the user has. The upgrade multiplier caps at a fairly high 10x, with the user needing 36 Shards of Life to maximize its effect. At 0 shards, ores will be not be upgraded at all (1x). For every shard the user has, up to 36, the multiplier will increase by .25x. For example, at 1 shard, the multiplier will be 1.25x and at 8 shards the multiplier will be 3x.

You will need to use an item like the Conveyor Ramp for ores to get onto the conveyor. The upgrader possesses looping capability after its initial multiplier of x2.5 on affected ore, with another x1.5 up to three more times, concluding for a total of ~x8.44 ore value. There is a drawback to it as it doesn't allow ores larger than 1.2x1.2x1.2. This item came back in the Christmas Update 2019, unboxable from the Fragile Gift of Frozen Containment.

It multiplies ore value by x8 and applies the Eternal Flame effect to ore. Eternal Flames Eternal Flames is an effect different from regular fire as they don't destroy ores. Ores with Eternal Flames are processed at a higher rate by the Awakened Jack O Lantern. Ores that are Fireproof will not be set on fire, however the Awakened Jack O Lantern will still process ores with the higher rate. son of poison.how_to_use: The Son of Poison is an added in the Reincarnation Update. It is one of the Trinity Upgraders, along with the Father of Freon and the Spirit of Fire. The Son of Poison multiplies ore value by a high 12x while also poisoning the ore. The poison takes 4 seconds to destroy the ore, but can be cured by items like the Wild Spore. If the Son of Poison is used as the last of the Trinity Upgraders, it starts off by multiplying the ore's value by x80 and then proceeding to apply a poison effect to the ore value, instead of the ore itself, where the ore loses 2% of its value every 0.5 seconds for 5 seconds. If the ore then stays untouched, this totals for a ~65.4x multiplier altogether. Similarly to the Lightningbolt Refiner and its variants, large ores cannot pass through this upgrader as there is a horizontal beam preventing their passage. This can be bypassed with an Ore Cannon or Hydraulic Conveyors. (You will also need the Hydraulic Ramp)
son of poison.name: Son of Poison

soul blossom.description: The most forsaken art of magic was born when this plant bloomed, granting wizards the power they need to siphon living souls for their craft.

soul blossom.how_to_use: The Soul Blossom is a Decimal-Rarity furnace added in The Magic Update. It possesses an aura that clears most negative status effects of any ore within its radius, similarly to a Wild Spore. It initially processes ore at x0, but if an ore upgraded by The Sporest, Mycolympus or Big Fungus has previously been processed, its multiplier becomes x1 permanently until removed. Its aura encloses a cylinder with a radius of ~6 units and height of ~4 units. However, since it takes up some of the area enclosed, it can only maximally reach 3 or 4 units out.
soul blossom.name: Soul Blossom

spectral upgrader.how_to_use: The Spectral Upgrader is an unusually thin Uncommon-tier upgrader added in The Resurrection Update. The Spectral Upgrader multiplies ore value based on the amount of machine tags the ore has. It starts at a base multiplier of x4.2, and decreases by 0.1 for every machine tag. This effect should not be confused with the Upgrade Counter, as that is dependent on the upgrader's effect itself, while this item is dependent on the number of unique machines/upgraders an ore passes through. Each unique upgrader only decreases the multiplier of this upgrader by 0.1 regardless of how many times that upgrader is used. Therefore, this is best used at the start of your money-limit upgraders.
spectral upgrader.name: Spectral Upgrader

spookapocalypse.how_to_use: The is a added during the Part 2 of the 2025 Halloween Event. The ore's value starts between and . Ores dropped have a permanent Battle-Hardened tag and 10 seconds of Conqueror effect, which will effectively receive a roughly x4 upgrade and an upgrade counter of -10. Ores will receive a +x7 multiplier to the Scales of Disparity's Rot calculation instead of the +x5. Ores upgraded by Schrodingers-type items will have their multiplier doubled. Its ore can also virtually power anything that needs fuel, with the exception of Crystal Shrine, Crystal Altar, and Gargantium Core. This makes it useful for powering Radio Tower, The Cosmic Tower, and The Eternal Overseer at the same time. spookbaron 360 000.how_to_use: The SpookBaron-360,000 is an added in the 2019 Halloween Event. Following the pattern of the Spook mines, it has an ore value that correlates to the user's number of inferno boxes and their concurrent life. What really makes this Spook mine stand out is its unique passive effect of having 3 shields which render the ore invulnerable, alongside its initial upgrade counter of 0, allowing it to be used with cell furnaces. The 3 shields that accompany each ore protect the ore from destruction (not to be confused with explosions). To make the most out of these shields, one can use many gambler items or blasters for the best results. The only upgraders that bypass these shields are the Black Dwarf/Void Star, Draedon's Gauntlet effect, the Illuminati items, The Guillotine, the Lightningbolt Refiner, and its variants. Ores initially start out with a deep red color and turn increasingly white as more shields are destroyed.
spookbaron 360 000.name: SpookBaron-360,000

spookboy 500.how_to_use: The Spookboy-500 is a sold by the Headless Baron during the Halloween 2019 event. Its shape and size is small compared to other Spook droppers, hence being named "boy". It features wings on the sides along with winged pumpkins.

spookdemon 66 666.how_to_use: The SpookDemon-66,666 is an . It was part of the Halloween 2018 event, released on October 29th, 2018. The SpookDemon-66,666 has a similar effect to its older relative, the SpookLord-95,000, in which it has its own upgraders. The upgraders come in the form of ghosts, which are created upon the combination of a coal ore and the ore from this dropper, destroying both ore in the process. They multiply ore value by 2x, and up to 5 ghosts can be present at any given time. Replacing the dropper also destroys the ghosts, requiring the user to recreate them. Ore value Functionality The base ore value is . This value is then multiplied by the user's Inferno Boxes and Pumpkin Boxes added together, and then by your life. To compensate for this, it cannot be processed by most cell furnaces, with few exceptions, such as the Blind Justice. It is also multiplied by the MOTD value (Pizza Party Event was -88, which caused it to break).
spookdemon 66 666.name: SpookDemon-66,666

stardust illuminator.how_to_use: The Stardust Illuminator is an , a fusion between the Ore Illuminator and the Stardust Pulsar, added in the Reincarnation Update. Upon activation, it will educate all the ores on your base for 28-32 seconds, multiplying their value by x66 at the end of their education period. Any ores that have their upgrade counter changed during this education period are destroyed. If the Gargantium Mine is placed on your base, the dropper will turn green and the time required for completed education becomes instantaneous for the Ore Illuminator, Indoctrinator and for the Stardust Illuminator itself. Do note that while the particles do stay for however long they usually do, the multiplier has already been applied and the education effect is completed.
stardust illuminator.name: Stardust Illuminator

stardust pulsar.description: Call upon the power of the solar system, in every star to power up your ores! Upgrades all ores on your plot by x35.

stardust pulsar.how_to_use: The Stardust Pulsar is an that was added in the New Heights Update. Upon pressing the "PULSE" Button, it upgrades all ore by x35. It is a one time use item, and cannot be used again on ore in conjunction with resetting devices. All ores affected by this item become a saturated red color. Using the Stardust Pulsar with the Gargantium Mine and Core will turn them a magenta color, giving affected ores gradual upgrades for a short time. The Stardust Pulsar takes roughly 37 seconds to recharge, which can be bypassed by replacing it. Note that ores will still be destroyed by this upgrade if they hold the education effect given by the Ore Illuminator or Ore Indoctrinator.
stardust pulsar.name: Stardust Pulsar

steel refinery.description: A powerful machine used to collect Steel from Iron Ore. Click the button on the side to release Steel.

steel refinery.how_to_use: The Steel Refinery is a that was sold by The Innovator. It collects iron ore and turns it into steel. If the button on the side is pressed while the number displayed next to it is 0, no steel will be returned. If the value displayed is above 0, it will return steel to the user. While the item description implies that it only accepts iron ores, the only criteria for an ore to be valid, is to have the same color as iron ores. This also means that any iron ore that doesn't have it's original color is not accepted. The Ore Painter can paint ores in the valid color, with the right most color of the 2nd row on its color selection panel. It was used to complete an objective set by the Innovator himself, which was to produce and collect 50 steel. Upon completion, the user must go back to the Innovator and they will receive a badge, and the Steel Refinery is turned into a powerful upgrader which can be used for standard setups. It can then be used as a step-up from the early game. It is then used as an ore converter, turning iron ore into steel ore, each worth $500, no matter what iron mine is used or how much their ore is worth. After the player completes gaining 50 steel pieces and claims the badge from the Innovator, they are rewarded an . It also can be used in setups as an iron filter. By placing this with any compatible mine and sending through 99 steel to a Blood Magic, you can easily get the x300 multiplier the furnace grants every 100 ore.
steel refinery.name: Steel Refinery

swag city.how_to_use: The Swag City is a added in The Magic Update. It is the item of Billy Lucifer, the Demigod of Hemomancy. Swag City is unique in that the area under the three streetlights serve as the upgrader beams, each being able to upgrade ores once. Using a Centering Conveyor, Railgun Cannon, or Dragon Cannon usually helps ensure the ores hit all three upgraders, assuming the ore is large enough to catch each beam. Another method is to use both, a Centering Conveyor first and then a Cannon. Functionality Swag City functions differently during daytime and nighttime. During the day, each streetlight upgrades ores by 4.5x, resulting in a total multiplier of 91.125x. During the night, each streetlight upgrades ores by 5.7x, resulting in a total multiplier of 185.193x. Each beam has a 20% chance of setting ores on fire, resulting in a 48.8% chance for ores to be ignited if every beam is used. Recipe Item NameQuantity Needed18109321
swag city.name: Swag City

sword master s spirit.how_to_use: The Sword Master's Spirit is a that was released in the August 2016 Update. It was first unveiled on Berezaa's Twitter and on his website. This furnace is a compensation for users that purchased the Sword Master Gamepass, since lethals were removed from Miner's Haven. It processes ores by 75x their value with no restrictions or extra effects. The Sword Master Gamepass is not currently available to be bought. During Black Friday 2016, for one minute, the Sword Master was made available for R$1000. Since some people still bought it, they were awarded this. On Black Friday 2017, the Sword Master gamepass made a return for 10 minutes at the price of R$899. During Black Friday 2019 and 2020, the gamepass made a return again for R$1000.

symmetrium mine.how_to_use: The Symmetrium Mine is a Reborn-tier dropper. It was first unveiled on Berezaa's Twitter and his old website. The Symmetrium Mine's ores can pass through upgraders that inflicts fire onto ores without being put on fire. However, this blue flame can be removed by resetting devices, Cooling Chamber, Wild Spore, and Freon upgraders. It will only produce 1 ore per minute only if the ore from the original dropper is still on the base. If the ore is not on the base anymore (by pulsar, furnace, or landing on the floor of the base) the mine will produce another ore even if it has not been 1 minute.

It was later added on the 19 September, 2017, in the Resurrection Update. Unlike its predecessor, only one Symmetryte Mine can be placed that will drop ore. The Symmetryte Mine has one disadvantage over the Symmetrium Mine, which is not being able to reach cells from the far side. Appearance The Symmetryte Mine has giant wings, and the tubes on the top of it have been moved to the sides of the dropper's spout. The area of ice behind the dropper has enlarged, and the screen of the front of it is now broken, with the switch being moved from the side of the screen to in front of the screen along with a new second switch and a keyboard.

By living up to its name, Tankium, this mine is not similar to other conventional mines. This is because it shoots ore worth as if they were shells (projectiles). These ores then explode after 10s, killing any players within range of the explosion. These explosions can also kill other ores.

tempest refiner.how_to_use: The Tempest Refiner is the Evolved Reborn variant of the Lightningbolt Refiner, released on December 6th, 2019. Aside from the 6x to 10x upgrade, it also activates other lightning-related items on your base, which include the Arcane Lightning, Lightningbolt Refiner, and the Lightningbolt Predictor without needing to press the buttons on those upgraders. Each click powers up the Tempest Refiner for about 2 seconds. While the Tempest Refiner does indeed share the same machine tag with all other lightning-related items, it does not seem to upgrade ore on the 2nd upgrade. Thus, it would be a wise choice to use a different item right after this one to maximize multipliers while also retaining ore safety from destruction.
tempest refiner.name: Tempest Refiner

tesla refuter.how_to_use: The Tesla Refuter is an , successor to the Tesla Resetter, added in the 100 Million Visits Event. Not only does it remove all machine tags from the ores, but before it removes the tags, it multiplies the ores based on how many machine tags there are within that one ore. The multiplier starts off at x1 for ores with no upgrade tags and increases by x1/15 (~x0.067) for every upgrade tag the ore has. The maximum multiplier is x10 (at 135 upgrade tags). Appearance It is 1 unit smaller in length and 2 units smaller in width than the Tesla Resetter. There are six bolts of lightning striking down upon the conveyor, as opposed to the single upgrade beam of the Tesla Resetter. The color is gray and pale yellow, while the Tesla Resetter supports a dark yellow. Category:Evolved Reborn Category:100 Million Visits Event Category:Upgrader Category:Reborn-Proof Category:Resetting Device Category:Superstitious Requirement Category:Utility Category:Not Resettable Category:Medium Category:Length 5 Upgrader Category:0 Upgrade Counter

It upgrade ores based on the player's life and mastery completionMastery completion is based on all-item mastery, not the starred mastery.. The formula for the multiplier is , where is mastery completion expressed as a number between 0 and 1 (e.g., 76.4% is 0.764, 100% is 1) and is the user life. the easter shrine.how_to_use: The Easter Shrine is an Exotic-tier furnace add in Easter 2017. It has a unique property of giving the player cash in the form of spawning eggs on their base. The Easter Shrine will drop an egg every 20 ores processed. The value of the egg is equal to the sum of the values of the ores processed since the last egg drop, multiplied by 125. This applies to all uncollected eggs, allowing for a crazy multiplier if you have a lot of uncollected eggs. However, the eggs will despawn after a certain amount of time.

the eternal overseer.how_to_use: The Eternal Overseer is an added in the Epilogue of the Halloween Event 2020. This upgrader works similarly to the The Cosmic Tower, except instead of multiplying an ore by 35x after it is created, it multiplies an ore by 15x almost immediately (~0.5 seconds) after its status changes for the first time. This can be replication, teleportation, a value change or even something like the Freon Sprayer. It requires Granite textured ores to power. The Easiest Way to power this furnace if you're a low life is to utilize a Platinum Mine or other shop Mines. Additionally, Widow's Outpost is a great way of turning ore into a granite texture so you can use any mine.
